title: Dora Prayanam
desc: A seven-year-old courageous girl, Dora, embarks on a trip with her best friend, Boots, in order to find something that interests her.

title: Little Hakka
desc: Little Hakka uses her magical 'Hakka Hat' to fight evil forces threatening nature in an animated children's adventure story.

title: Happy Birthday
desc: Children celebrate their birthdays with a heart-touching note from their loved ones on the occasion of the special memorable day.

title: Panda Mariyu Rooster Saahasalu
desc: A Panda and a rooster become friends as they set out on exciting adventures to explore the vibrant cultures of various countries while promoting the concept of cultural diversity.

title: Panchatantra Nethi Kathalu
desc: A comprehensive compilation of stories from the Panchatantra, a collection of Indian fables, that helps to instil morals and values in children.

title: Heidi
desc: Heidi lives in Frankfurt and has a friend, Clara. However, after spending time at her grandfather's place in the countryside, she yearns to go back and spend time in the open mountain pasture.
